title: 63mm White Organza Wired Ribbon – 18M Sheer Ribbon with Metallic Edge for Gift Wrapping, Bows, Floral Arrangements, Crafts, and Wedding Decorations
features: 【Size & Packaging】Each roll contains 18 meters of 63 mm wide organza ribbon, professionally spooled for tangle-free use and convenient storage.
【Lightweight Material】Made from high-quality sheer nylon ribbon that is soft, delicate, and lightweight, yet strong enough for structured designs.
【Edge Design】Features soft iron on both edges, allowing for effortless bow shaping and precise embellishment design.
【Sheer Finish】Sheer ribbon with a transparent quality that catches the light beautifully. Its ethereal shimmer creates an elegant and joyful aesthetic.
【Multipurpose Use】Ideal for floral arrangements, Christmas trees decorating, gift wrapping, party favors, holiday crafts, bouquet and more.
description: Thanks for Shopping With Zofrud Product Features Quality Organza Wired Ribbon Material: nylon and wire Width: 1.5"(38mm) & 2.5"(63mm) Length: 20 Yards (18m) x 1 Rolls Colors Available: White, Black, Pink, Red, Burgundy, Royal, Purple, Green, Moss, Orange, Gold, Ivory This ribbon features a delicate translucent texture with a subtle shimmer that adds sophistication to any design Please Note 1. Colors may vary slightly from photo due to different monitor settings. 2. When using, please be careful of the wires to avoid any potential harm.
